where.if: AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM social.content_i18n i WHERE i.content_id = c.id AND i.locale = 'zh' ) OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM social.content_i18n i WHERE i.content_id = c.id AND i.locale = 'en' ) )

mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.type, c.title, c.summary, c.cover_url AS coverUrl, c.body, c.source_type AS sourceType, c.source_url AS sourceUrl, c.published_at AS publishedAt, c.status, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM social.content c
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
